parameters.name: message
parameters.value:
={{'New inbound lead

Business: ' + $node['Normalize + Route Lead'].json.business_name + '
Lead: ' + $node['Normalize + Route Lead'].json.lead_name + '
Service: ' + $node['Normalize + Route Lead'].json.service_requested + '
Urgency: ' + $node['Normalize + Route Lead'].json.urgency + '
Run ID: ' + $node['Normalize + Route Lead'].json.run_id}}

parameters.jsCode:
const ai = $json;
const inbound = $node['Normalize WhatsApp Message'].json;
const lead = ai.lead ?? {};
const xmlEscape = (value) => String(value ?? '').replace(/&/g, '&').replace(/</g, '<').replace(/>/g, '>').replace(/\"/g, '"').replace(/'/g, ''');
const details = [
  `Issue: ${lead.issue_description || lead.service_requested || 'WhatsApp enquiry'}`,
  `Location: ${lead.location || lead.postcode || 'Not supplied'}`,
  `Urgency: ${lead.urgency || 'normal'}`,
  `Preferred timing: ${[lead.preferred_date, lead.preferred_time, lead.timing_notes].filter(Boolean).join(' ') || 'Not supplied'}`,
  `Budget/price: ${lead.budget_text || lead.price_value || lead.price_preference || 'Not supplied'}`,
  `Property: ${lead.property_type || 'Not supplied'}`,
  `Access notes: ${lead.access_notes || 'None supplied'}`,
  `AI summary: ${ai.summary || ''}`
].join('\n');
return { json: {
  phone: inbound.phone,
  message_sid: inbound.message_sid,
  dry_run: inbound.dry_run,
  reply: ai.reply,
  twiml: `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Response><Message>${xmlEscape(ai.reply)}</Message></Response>`,
  should_submit: Boolean(ai.should_submit && !inbound.dry_run && !ai.duplicate),
  lead_name: lead.name || inbound.profile_name || inbound.phone,
  business_name: `WhatsApp Lead - ${lead.name || inbound.profile_name || inbound.phone}`,
  email: lead.email || null,
  service_requested: lead.service_requested || 'WhatsApp enquiry',
  urgency: lead.urgency || 'normal',
  preferred_date: lead.preferred_date || null,
  preferred_time: lead.preferred_time || null,
  structured_message: details,
  source_channel: 'whatsapp',
  assigned_to: 'ops',
  alert_destination: $vars.g7TelegramTarget ?? 'CONFIGURE_IN_N8N',
  ai_summary: ai.summary || 'WhatsApp AI intake',
  missing_required: ai.missing_required || [],
  lead_complete: Boolean(ai.lead_complete),
  confirmed: Boolean(ai.confirmed)
} };

project.name: G7CRM Automations
project.description: G7CRM lead intake, WhatsApp AI, Supabase and Telegram workflows
